message:
fix: detect tmux-alive-but-agent-dead zombies in DetectZombiePolecats (gt-kj6r6)

DetectZombiePolecats previously only checked HasSession to determine if a
polecat was alive. If the tmux session existed, it was assumed healthy
(unless stuck in done-intent). This missed the case where the tmux session
is alive but the agent process inside it has died.

Now calls IsAgentAlive for sessions that DO exist, matching what status.go
already does. Zombies of this class are killed via NukePolecat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
